name: EventHandler - InterceptAPChange
description: Verify InterceptAPChange EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Find skill with InterceptAPChange
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("InterceptAPChange"); }); skill != null ? skill.ToString() : null

steps.name: Load EventHandlers array
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("InterceptAPChange"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers != null

steps.name: Verify _type field
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("InterceptAPChange"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("InterceptAPChange") ? true : false

steps.name: Read ActionPointPercentage parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("InterceptAPChange"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("ActionPointPercentage")

steps.name: Read AppliesTo parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("InterceptAPChange"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("AppliesTo")

steps.name: Read TriggerOnlyOncePerRound parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("InterceptAPChange"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("TriggerOnlyOncePerRound")
